error_pattern: Perfectly uniform: exactly 61 pass / 19 fail / 4 skip on ALL 8 sites.
notes: Perfectly uniform results — exactly the same 19 tests fail on every site. This is a clear signal that the 19 failing tests have a systematic issue (not site-specific): either testing a feature not available on staging, or a test implementation bug. The 61 passing tests are consistently stable. Priority investigation: identify the common 19 failing test IDs — if they test a feature unavailable on staging, they should be marked @data-dependent or skipped.
